borders.title: Trusted Transfers Across Borders
borders.titleDescription: From licensing to compliance, every layer of our platform is built to protect your money and your trust. Licensed to operate in over 50+ countries, we makes cross-border transfers fast, affordable, and stress-free.

details.title: Licenses
details.description: We are an Authorised Payment Institution, authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority under the Payment Service Regulations 2017 (670226) and a licensed money transmitter registered with HM Revenue & Customs (XBML00000150442).

details.title: International Regulations
details.description: We are regulated as a Small Payments Institution in Poland. We are also a regulated International Money Transfer Organization by the Central Bank of Nigeria.

details.title: Compliance
details.description: We protect your information with robust data security measures in compliance with GDPR and  NDPR.
